title: [InstCombine] Honor rewrite semantics of fast-math flags in InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
author: mikolaj-pirog

tests.test_body:
define double @fdiv_cos_sin_reassoc_multiple_uses(double %a) {
  %1 = call reassoc double @llvm.cos.f64(double %a)
  %2 = call reassoc double @llvm.sin.f64(double %a)
  %div = fdiv reassoc double %1, %2
  call void @use(double %2)
  ret double %div
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare double @llvm.cos.f64(double) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)

declare void @use(double)

  %2 = call contract fp128 @llvm.sin.f128(fp128 %a)
  %div = fdiv contract fp128 %1, %2
  ret fp128 %div
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare fp128 @llvm.cos.f128(fp128) #0

declare void @use_f32(float)

define float @div_with_div_denominator_with_one_as_numerator_extra_use(float %x, float %y, float %z) {
  %div1 = fdiv arcp float 1.000000e+00, %y
  %div2 = fdiv arcp float %z, %div1
  call void @use_f32(float %div1)
  ret float %div2
}

declare void @use_f32(float)

define float @div_with_div_denominator_extra_use(float %x, float %y, float %z) {
  %div1 = fdiv float %x, %y
  %div2 = fdiv fast float %z, %div1
  call void @use_f32(float %div1)
  ret float %div2
}

define double @exp_a_exp_b_exp_c_exp_d_fast(double %a, double %b, double %c, double %d) {
  %t = call reassoc double @llvm.exp.f64(double %a)
  %t1 = call reassoc double @llvm.exp.f64(double %b)
  %mul = fmul reassoc double %t, %t1
  %t2 = call reassoc double @llvm.exp.f64(double %c)
  %mul1 = fmul reassoc double %mul, %t2
  %t3 = call reassoc double @llvm.exp.f64(double %d)
  %mul2 = fmul reassoc double %mul1, %t3
  ret double %mul2
}

  %sqrt = call reassoc double @llvm.sqrt.f64(double %x)

  ret double %squared

  %2 = call reassoc double @llvm.sqrt.f64(double %b)
  %3 = call reassoc double @llvm.sqrt.f64(double %c)
  %4 = call reassoc double @llvm.sqrt.f64(double %d)
  %mul = fmul reassoc nnan arcp double %1, %2
  %mul1 = fmul reassoc nnan double %mul, %3
  %mul2 = fmul reassoc nnan ninf double %mul1, %4
  ret double %mul2
}

declare void @use_f32(float)

define float @fmul_fadd_distribute_extra_use(float %x) {
  %t1 = fmul float %x, 6.000000e+00
  %t2 = fadd float %t1, 2.000000e+00
  %t3 = fmul fast float %t2, 5.000000e+00
  call void @use_f32(float %t2)
  ret float %t3
}

comments.author: mikolaj-pirog
comments.body:
This PR has https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/173912 included. It should be merged after it.

I'm not submitting an alive2 proof since it's my understanding that it doesn't support semantics of rewrite fmf
